chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1358 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 30.11.2023 Mr. Achar Khan Gabol, Advocate for petitioners. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsel does not press this petition and submits that he would avail remedy as per law. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed as not pressed, leaving the petitioner at liberty to avail remedy before the proper forum, in accordance with law. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
